title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
company: Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners:
Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners!
